canonical_name: The priestesses of the House of Maidens
the queen of an unregarded kingdom
a world where it is easier to be good
that Saxon hero who tore the arm from the Lake monster
one of those beer-guzzling Saxon kings
the fair fields and meadows of my home
the road of the great whale
A young man in dark clothing
one at my table I do not know
father to the child of a High Priestess of Avalon
the child of a High Priestess of Avalon
the Saxons where I spent three years learning to be a warrior
the bastard son of a man like you
all the men in this kingdom who could have fathered me
the greater warrior of us two
the land the king shall rule
the evil old Gods among whom the Devil had sway
a good and pious Christian knight
all of us who fought in those days
two young men dressed in white
The old priestess of the oracles-
